robertlinton1
Sponsored
I am bothered by plastic the interior of certain cars.  Particularly in interiors such as those created by Porsche Sonderwunsch, plastic seems out of place.  In 991 and 992, the most blatant offender to style, and continually staring at you as you drive, is the vinyl steering wheel cover for the air bag.  Especially in my GT2RS, with its elegant all leather interior, the steering wheel center looks less than optimal.  This is the answer, a first for 991 and 992, beautifully executed with superb craftsmanship including black stitching and the embossing of the horn symbols, the high quality, handcrafted, custom black leather steering wheel air bag cover.  It is proof that to create the best, attention to detail is vital as those details matter.  Indeed, in creating an interior with which to get out and drive and drive tastefully, everything is important.  Yes, for the ultimate in luxury inside a vehicle, every mod, every upgrade, every enhancement and every improvement adds to the ambience.
 
#porsche911 #991 #992 #gt2rs #airbag #attentiontodetail #beautiful #black #carinterior #cover #craftsmanship #custom #detailsmatter #drivetastefully #elegant #enhancement #everythingisimportant #first #getoutanddrive #handcrafted #highquality #improvement #leather #luxury #mod #steeringwheel #stitching #style #ultimate #upgrade
